intention: 公司要求所有人做某事（全员要求）
naturalChunk: the company requires everyone to [do something]
avoidSaying: the company require every one to / the company ask everyone to
sentencePatterns: Our organization requires everyone to ... before ...
realLifeExamples: The company requires everyone to update their personal information annually.
The company requires everyone to complete the security training before accessing the system.
productionPrompts: 用 The company requires everyone to ... 造一句关于公司规定或政策的句子。
